title: Outdoor Power Equipment and Other Small Engine Mechanics
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul small engines used to power lawn mowers, chain saws, recreational sporting equipment, and related equipment.

tasks.text: Record repairs made, time spent, and parts used.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Test and inspect engines to determine malfunctions, to locate missing and broken parts, and to verify repairs, using diagnostic instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Dismantle engines, using hand tools, and examine parts for defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and maintain gasoline engines used to power equipment such as portable saws, lawn mowers, generators, and compressors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust points, valves, carburetors, distributors, and spark plug gaps, using feeler gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective parts such as magnetos, water pumps, gears, pistons, and carburetors, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance such as cleaning and oiling parts, honing cylinders, and tuning ignition systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Reassemble engines after repair or maintenance work is complete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain problem descriptions from customers, and prepare cost estimates for repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Show customers how to maintain equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove engines from equipment, and position and bolt engines to repair stands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grind, ream, rebore, and re-tap parts to obtain specified clearances, using grinders, lathes, taps, reamers, boring machines, and micrometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
